# YeboMart

> AI-Powered Shop Management for African Businesses

YeboMart is an AI-powered point-of-sale and shop management system for African small businesses. Manage inventory, track sales, handle staff and suppliers, and get AI-powered business insights — from a phone or web browser.

YeboMart is part of the Omevision family of African-built tech products, headquartered in Mbabane, Eswatini. Category: POS / SMB Software.

## What it does

- Point-of-sale (POS) system
- Inventory management
- Staff and supplier management
- AI business assistant
- Sales analytics and reports
- Multi-country support across 15 African markets
- Barcode scanning (phone camera or hardware scanner)

## Who it is for

Small and medium shop owners across Africa: grocery stores, spaza shops, butcheries, pharmacies, salons, and more.

## Pricing model

YeboMart is **free to use**. There are no subscription tiers and no
monthly fees. The full feature set — POS, products, sales, stock, staff,
reports, multi-shop — is available to every shop at no cost.

You only pay for actions that cost YeboMart real money on the back end,
billed as **credits** (1 credit = ~E1 / ~USD 0.05, localized per market):

- AI assistant (Flash model): 0.5 credits per question
- AI assistant (Pro model): 1 credit per question
- SMS via YeboLink: 1 credit per message
- WhatsApp via YeboLink: 2 credits per message
- Email via YeboLink: 1 credit per message

Top-up packs (Starter 100 credits = E100, Standard 500 credits = E450,
Bulk 2,000 credits = E1,600) buy in advance; credits never expire. Shops
that don't use AI or messaging never pay anything.

## Authentication

Owners sign in with [YeboID](https://yeboid.com) — the Omevision-wide
phone+OTP+PIN identity, no passwords. Staff (cashiers / managers) sign in
on the shop's device with a 4-digit PIN issued by the owner.

## Links

- [YeboMart (main site)](https://yebomart.com): the product homepage.
- [YeboMart app](https://app.yebomart.com): sign in / sign up.
- [YeboMart blog](https://blog.yebomart.com): product updates, guides, and announcements.
